Class SrEngineer

java.lang.Object
  |
  +--Employee
        |
        +--Manager
              |
              +--SrEngineer
public class SrEngineer
extends Manager

Senior Engineer class which is derived from the Manager class. The only difference is that Senior Engineer returns a name with "P.E." appended to it.

Since:
1.0
See Also:
Jamie's Page

getName
